courses.title: Coronet Peak 2026
courses.summary: Queenstown's pioneer ski field — terrain, lessons, snowmaking and the 2026 capital programme. Pitch with confidence to all guest types.

modules.title: Mountain overview
modules.summary: Where Coronet Peak sits, who it suits, the headline 2026 changes.

blocks.text_md: **Coronet Peak** is NZSki's pioneer ski field — 25 minutes from Queenstown CBD, suited to all abilities with a strong intermediate and family draw. Open daily winter 2026 from **June 13** through to **early October**.
**New for 2026** — A South Island–first **Snow Factory** producing premium snow regardless of temperature, dramatically improving the early-season experience.
Headline 2026 capital programme: Kidzone carpet upgrade, new Snow Factory, **new Snowsports Heli Premium Private** experience launched alongside existing private-coaching tiers.

modules.title: Lifts & terrain map
modules.summary: Lift configuration, terrain mix, what to recommend for beginners vs advanced.

blocks.text_md: Lift network across Coronet's bowl plus the M1 Express on the back face. Beginner zone fed by Meadows and Kidzone carpets; intermediates spread across Greengates / Rocky Gully; experts head to Back Bowls when conditions allow.

modules.title: Lessons & coaching
modules.summary: Three private-coaching tiers — Premium, Performance, Premium Heli. Who they're for and how to position them.

blocks.text_md: Coronet Peak offers **three tiers of private coaching**, each capped at 4 guests per instructor. Choosing the right tier depends on ability level and what the guest wants to get out of the day.
**Premium Privates** — family-friendly, all abilities. **NZ$ from 1,099/day**. Recommend for first-timers through to confident intermediates and mixed-ability groups.
**Performance Privates** — technique-focused for advanced skiers/snowboarders. **NZ$ from 1,299/day**. Recommend when the guest's goal is measurable improvement.

**Premium Heli Privates** — backcountry heli access for advanced+ guests. **NZ$ from 2,890/day** including 2 drop-offs and full mountain-safety briefing. Subject to weather. Only available at Coronet Peak (not Remarkables or Mt Hutt).

modules.title: Pricing & inclusions
modules.summary: Lift passes, rentals, bundles, and trade rates.

blocks.text_md: Day lift passes start at **NZ$ 169 adult / 99 child** at gate; **advance purchase** discounts available 14+ days out. 3-mountain pass (Coronet + Remarkables + Mt Hutt) is the best value for guests staying 4+ days in NZ.

modules.title: Booking & FAQ
modules.summary: How agents book, snow-day policy, transport from Queenstown.

blocks.text_md: Trade bookings via the NZSki Travel Trade portal. **Snow-day cancellation policy:** if the resort closes for the full day, lift-pass holders receive a credit (not refund) usable within 24 months at any NZSki resort. Lessons and heli are rebooked subject to availability or fully refunded.
